summary: Frontend testing for new products, CSS animations, and dropshipper tracking tab - All features verified and working

minor.issue: Script was using wrong database (cloleo instead of test_database). Fixed by running with DB_NAME=test_database

passed_tests: Homepage loads successfully with navbar and product cards
New 99 products visible in categories (56 new products seeded to correct database)
Mode & Textile category shows 53 products including new ones (Robe Wax Ankara Premium, Chemise Bazin Brodée Homme, etc.)
ProductCard hover animations working - card lifts up 8px on hover (matrix transform)
ProductCard add-to-cart button slides up on hover
CSS keyframe animations loaded (fadeIn, fadeInUp, slideIn, bounce, pulse-glow, shimmer, float, wiggle, heartbeat, gradient-shift)
CSS animation classes loaded (animate-fade-in, hover-lift, hover-glow, card-hover, product-card)
Dropshipper dashboard loads with stats cards
'Suivi livraisons' tab visible in dropshipper sidebar
DropshipperOrderTracking component renders with stats cards (Total commandes, En cours, Livrées, En livraison)
Tracking component shows map placeholder when no order selected
Navbar shows 'Espace dropshipper' link for logged-in dropshippers
User dropdown menu shows dropshipper info and logout option
seed_data_creation: Ran seed_products.py with DB_NAME=test_database to add 56 new products (99 total in correct database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) 99 new products added via seed_products.py (mode, artisanat, bijoux, beauté, électronique, maison, produits locaux, sport), 2) CSS animations working (fadeIn, slideIn, hover-lift, etc.), 3) ProductCard animations working (hover lift, scale, add-to-cart slide), 4) Dropshipper 'Suivi livraisons' tab working with stats cards and map placeholder, 5) Navbar shows dropshipper links when logged in

product_card_animations.hover_lift: Card transforms with matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, -8) on hover
product_card_animations.add_to_cart_slide: Button slides up and becomes visible on hover

dropshipper_tracking_tab.map_placeholder: Shows 'Sélectionnez une commande pour voir le suivi'
